description: Assess the water reactivity hazards for Sodium (CAS 7440-23-5), Calcium Carbide (CAS 75-20-7), Acetone (CAS 67-64-1), Potassium (CAS 7440-09-7), and Ethanol (CAS 64-17-5) using the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). For each chemical, determine if it is water-reactive (YES/NO) and identify any hazardous gases produced. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/water_reactivity_report.txt listing each chemical, its classification (Water-Reactive: YES or NO), and a brief description of the reaction or hazards found.
